chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D- 389 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case For hearing of main case. 25-05-2022 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G. ***** On the last date of hearing, statement was made by Counsel for the Sukkur Municipal Corporation that as per record there is no application of the Petitioner, as claimed for his early retirement. In view of such position, this Petition is disposed of by directing the Petitioner to approach the Sukkur Municipal Corporation with proper application Once application is filed, same be dealt with in accordance with the law. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
